analytics.a1cDesc: Calculate your estimated A1C based on your glucose readings
analytics.filterDesc: Choose any time period and view your personalized reports

community.title: A Supportive and Active Community
community.description: Share your experience and receive support from people who understand you

post.name: Montaser Ismail
post.title: A Difficult Day with High Glucose
post.content: Today my glucose level was higher than usual, and I felt tired with a headache. I tried adjusting my meals, drinking more water, and taking a short walk. Hopefully the numbers will improve. The important thing is that I'm continuing and not giving up.

doctors.title: Advice from Verified Doctors
doctors.description: Get trusted medical advice from specialists

donation.title: Be Part of the Change
donation.description: Help those who need medical devices and medication. Every donation, no matter how small, makes a difference in someone's life.

ahmed.name: Ahmed Mohamed
ahmed.text: This platform completely changed my life. I can now track my readings easily and better understand how food and activity affect my body.

sara.name: Sara Ali
sara.text: The community here is amazing. People support each other and share experiences. I finally feel like I'm not alone in this.

mahmoud.name: Mahmoud Hassan
mahmoud.text: The reports and analytics helped me understand my body better and adjust my treatment more effectively with my doctor.

cta.title: Start Your Health Journey Today
cta.description: Join thousands of users who manage their health with confidence and intelligence
